title: Text
text: Text Text of the help text. This is displayed in w window when a user activates the field-level help trigger at runtime. Applies To Help Text Related Links Messages Messages are language-related objects that enable you to deploy a Uniface application in different languages and locales. They are stored in language-specific libraries, and Uniface automatically chooses the appropriate library at runtime based on the configuration. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
